subcodes.first_line: God willing, may you ever and always drink from the Kawthar of mystic knowledge of the Best-Beloved of all possibility, and abide beneath the shade of the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از کوثر عرفان محبوب امکان بیاشامید و در ظل سدره
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
